title: Bruce Harris
compiled_truth: Bruce Harris is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-09-17 to 2001-10-15), Bruce Harris sent 13 and received 88 emails, totalling 101 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (6), [Robert George](people/robert-george) (5), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (5), [Nancy Muchmore](people/nancy-muchmore) (3), [Pedro Oliveira](people/pedro-oliveira) (2).
